nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: John Debell was born in 1600, in England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter with Mary Gater. He died in 1650, in Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 50.
